purpose: 继续推进强趋势回踩确认线。fix_rerun 已经证明该结构能把 120d 最大回撤从尾盘线约 -27.65% 压到 -10%~-17% 区间，但 120d 真实 T+1 open 的最佳配置交易数只有 30-48，略低于 50 笔晋级门槛。本轮目标是在不破坏 DD/PF 的前提下扩充样本和交易数。
hypothesis: 强趋势池回踩确认的 alpha 来自更好的入场结构。通过扩大候选池、适度放宽回踩/确认条件、或调整 max_positions，可以把 120d 交易数提高到 50+，同时保持 max_drawdown <= -18%、PF > 1.4、return >= 8%。

background.source_of_truth: GitHub caiku repo. Always pull latest from C:\Users\56440\.claude\caiku-sync before reading/writing results.

best_120d_clues.note: Excellent DD/PF, but too few trades.
Closest to full promotion; needs only slightly more trades.
Touch-reclaim should not be permanently rejected after fix rerun.
Good return/PF, DD close to threshold.

current_decision: Pullback confirmation is now the most promising strategy line.
It may enter paper trading observation, but not full live mainline until 120d trade count and robustness improve.
Do not return to tail-entry high-beta optimization unless explicitly requested.

requested_work.description: Create a new standalone script, recommended name run_pullback_confirmation_expand_sample.py. Reuse the fixed windowing, fixed baseline comparison, and full-results output behavior from the fix rerun. Do not use the older flawed baseline/window logic.
Primary test must be 120d, realistic T+1 open entry. 90d is reference only. Do not call a 90d-only result promoted.

Expand trade count cautiously. Test universe/top pool expansion if feasible: CSI300 top 60 baseline, plus top 80/top 100/top 150 or all CSI300 if runtime/data allow. Report actual universe size and whether kline/factor coverage drops.

Test trend-pool relaxations around TP_RANK: d3 >= 8/7/6, ret_20d >= 0/-2, daily rank top 20/30/40 by z(d3)+z(ma20_gap), and optional ma20_above_ma60 / price_above_ma60 gates. Keep the original strict TP_RANK as control.

Test pullback families that survived or nearly survived: lower_shadow_reclaim, no_chase, touch_reclaim_ma20, shallow_pullback, shrink_pullback. For lower_shadow_reclaim, test threshold variants if lower_shadow_pct is available. For no_chase, vary exclusion of close near 20d high and large same-day gain.

Confirmation variants: close_above_ma20, close_positive_after_pullback, none, and volume_reexpand if available. Do not add many new exotic confirmations; the goal is sample expansion around known promising rules.
Exit variants: hold_5d_close, hold_8d_close, hold_10d_close. Include ma20_or_pullback_low_break_then_hold5 only as a control because prior 120d trades>=50 variants with this exit had DD above target.
Position constraints: pp10 and pp15 are primary; pp20 is stress only. max_positions=2 and 3. If mp3 increases trades but pushes DD above -18%, do not promote it.
Optional environment tag: report performance with and without csi_dd20_le_5 as a weak warning overlay, but do not make it the main solution if it reduces trade count below 50.

Write full all_results. Then rank separately: (A) 120d promoted candidates trades>=50; (B) 120d near-promoted candidates trades 45-49; (C) 120d low-trade high-quality candidates trades 30-44; (D) 90d reference. Do not hide failed high-trade configs.

Promotion standard: 120d, T+1 open, trades>=50, max_drawdown <= -18%, PF > 1.4, total_return >= 8%, first/second halves both positive or at least not contradictory, and DD not merely reduced by very low exposure. Near-promotion standard: trades 45-49 with all other metrics passing.

Final recommendation must answer: can the 120d trade-count problem be solved without breaking DD; which rule family should become paper-trading config; whether to accept trades>=45 as enough for observation; and what the next task should be.

questions_for_cc: Can 120d realistic T+1 open pullback confirmation reach trades>=50 while keeping DD<=18%, PF>1.4, return>=8%?
Which expansion helps most without breaking DD: larger universe, wider trend pool, looser pullback, mp3, or longer hold?
Does lower_shadow_reclaim remain the best quality rule after sample expansion?
Does no_chase remain the closest fully tradable rule?
Is touch_reclaim_ma20 genuinely rehabilitated after the fixed rerun, or was its good result specific to hold_8d?
Should paper trading use the strict low-DD config, the near-promoted higher-trade config, or both as separate lanes?
constraints: No future leakage. Signal must use data visible at or before signal-date close; entry is T+1 open for primary results.
Do not restore V9 total score as sole buy signal.
Do not use T-close optimistic results for promotion.
Do not promote configs with DD > -18% even if return is high.
Do not hide the trade-count / exposure tradeoff.
Do not overwrite prior reports; use timestamped files.
Write results into the caiku/v8_desktop reports and backtest_queue/done paths.
done_when: reports contains raw summary and full-results file
summary explicitly says whether any 120d T+1 open config achieved trades>=50 with DD<=18, PF>1.4, return>=8
summary identifies the paper-trading observation config(s)
